title: One-Time User Setup Screen
summary: First-time users land on a guided setup screen after login. They enter their IBKR credentials, Claude API key, and initial strategy preferences. Credentials are encrypted client-side before ever leaving the browser — the server only ever stores the encrypted blob.
approach: Build a multi-step setup wizard (3 steps): (1) IBKR credentials — account ID, gateway host, port, password. (2) Claude API key. (3) Strategy preferences — score thresholds, risk %, options on/off, kill switch, favourite symbols. Client-side JS encrypts credentials with a key derived from the user's password (WebCrypto API, PBKDF2 + AES-GCM) before POST. Server stores encrypted blob in user's container volume. On setup complete: set setup_complete flag, redirect to main dashboard. Add a re-run setup option in settings if user wants to update credentials.
